commands.narrative:
## v17/v18 calm-survivor family declared INVALID — all four variants killed after crossing n=100 with negative outlier-stripped P&L

The session opens early (n=15 trades, 2 graduations, today net −2.173 SOL) with all 15 trades from a single graduation (20849) that dumped hard through SL across every strategy simultaneously. Diagnose is HEALTHY — pipeline confirmed running at normal cadence. This is one bad token, not a systemic failure.

The key action this cycle is the formal death of the calm-survivor filter family. All four surviving variants crossed n=100 and all report negative `total_net_sol_drop_top3`: v17-be5 n=108 drop3=−1.907 SOL; v17-be7 n=108 drop3=−1.406 SOL; v17-be9 n=107 drop3=−1.692 SOL; v18-calm-mkv-exitonly n=106 drop3=−2.054 SOL. The median return profile was genuinely positive across all four (8–9%), but the loss tail — driven by events like grad 20564's −91% wipeout sweeping all strategies simultaneously — made the SOL math unworkable at TP=10/SL=25. The v17 BE-trigger experiments (5%, 7%, 9%) each improved the mean by ~3pp but could not fix the structural problem. Markov early-exit (v18) added zero value over static SL in net-SOL terms. Lesson: positive median + negative drop_top3 = distribution shape artefact, not edge. The calm-survivor filter selects for tokens that are calm at entry but still has poor discrimination on the worst-case tail tokens — as evidenced by every major bad graduation hitting all calm-survivor variants simultaneously.

Also killing v11-vel5dev3-t30, which the edge-decay system flagged DECAYING (recent-30 median −20.16% vs all-time −5.21%). At n=49, the apparent +0.102 SOL total is entirely from 1–3 lottery trades (drop_top3=−1.663). Stopping now before the next bad graduation adds to accumulating losses.

**Self-check on the watch list:** v10-best-double (n=51) looks like the #1 promotion candidate on the readiness leaderboard (score 90.2) but deserves a caution flag: top3_contribution_pct=90.2%, meaning 90% of its +2.548 SOL comes from just 3 wins. Strip those and drop3=+0.250 SOL — barely above water. The edge may be real but the sample is concentrated. Win rate 43.1% is also below the distribution-healthy range. Watch closely as it approaches n=60; if drop3 dips negative, kill immediately. By contrast, v9shadow-velmono-dev (n=23) is the highest-conviction accumulator in the portfolio: drop3=+2.017 SOL at n=23, top3_contribution only 44.6%, trimmed mean +32.5%. Thin sample but very clean distribution shape. Growing this to n=50 is the top data-collection priority.

Panel 11 confirms: vel 20-50 + dd>−10% is STABLE (wr_std=6.0%, n=120) and age>10min + top5<10% is STABLE (wr_std=5.1%, n=128). Both are well-positioned when their live shadow strategies hit n=100.

Pipeline incidents have auto-healed both times (WS zombie 2026-05-11, T30 stall 2026-05-10). No manual intervention was needed. If a third incident occurs in the next session, escalate to keepalive/heartbeat tuning in graduation-listener.ts — two data points suggest robustness, three would suggest a systemic gap.

anomalies.detail: v17-calm-be5/be7/be9 and v18-calm-mkv-exitonly all crossed n=100 with negative drop_top3. All four killed this cycle. Combined loss: ~5.9 SOL in total_net_sol (all four combined). The calm-survivor filter family is definitively not an edge.
v11-vel5dev3-t30 flagged DECAYING (recent_30_median=−20.16% vs all-time −5.21%). At n=49, drop_top3=−1.663 SOL. Killed proactively before n=50.

v10-best-double top3_contribution_pct=90.2% at n=51. The entire +2.548 SOL nearly disappears after stripping top 3 wins (drop3=+0.250). Marginal edge — one cluster of bad trades could flip it INVALID.
All 15 today-so-far trades from graduation 20849 (single token). Every strategy hit SL or early-exit. Diagnose HEALTHY — pipeline normal, not a systemic issue.

patterns.pattern: Calm-survivor filter confirmed structurally broken at n=100
patterns.detail: v17-be5/be7/be9 and v18-mkv-exitonly all show median ~8-9% but drop_top3 between −1.406 and −2.054 SOL at n~107. The common failure mode: simultaneous SL sweeps on bad graduation events (grad 20564, grad 20849) that the calm-survivor filter fails to exclude. Positive median does not imply positive SOL accumulation when the filter has poor tail discrimination.

patterns.pattern: Pipeline auto-reconnect working — no manual intervention needed (2/2)
patterns.detail: WS zombie on 2026-05-11 and T30 stall on 2026-05-10 both self-healed. Diagnose HEALTHY at session start confirms normal operation. If third incident occurs, investigate keepalive tuning in graduation-listener.ts.

patterns.pattern: vel 20-50 band consistently produces the best alpha
patterns.detail: Top 5 by total_net_sol: v9shadow-vel20-top5 (+3.742), v9shadow-velmono-dev (+3.637, uses vel 20-50), v10-best-double (+2.548, vel 20-50+dd>−10%). Panel 11 confirms vel 20-50 + dd>−10% is STABLE (wr_std=6.0%). This velocity band is the strongest single signal in the catalog.

patterns.pattern: v9shadow-velmono-dev shows best outlier-adjusted quality at n=23
patterns.detail: drop3=+2.017 SOL at n=23, top3_contribution=44.6%, trimmed_mean=+32.5%. Remarkable quality distribution for a sub-30 strategy. Compare to v10-best-double at n=51 with drop3=+0.250 and top3_contribution=90.2%. Velmono-dev is higher conviction per trade.

kill.reason: n=108, total_net_sol_drop_top3=−1.907 SOL. Crossed n=100 with all outlier-strip gates negative. Calm-survivor filter does not accumulate SOL.
n=108, total_net_sol_drop_top3=−1.406 SOL. Same as be5 — BE@+7% improved mean by ~3pp but could not fix the structural SOL deficit.
n=107, total_net_sol_drop_top3=−1.692 SOL. Best BE variant on per-trade median (8.53%) but still INVALID on net SOL after outlier strip.
n=106, total_net_sol_drop_top3=−2.054 SOL. Markov early-exit confirmed zero improvement over static SL in net-SOL terms. INVALID.
DECAYING (recent_30_median=−20.16%), n=49, drop_top3=−1.663 SOL. Apparent +0.102 SOL total is entirely lottery-driven. Killing proactively before n=50 accumulates further losses.

watch.reason: n=51, drop3=+0.250, monthly=+7.18 SOL/mo. Three SOL gates clear, only n<100 outstanding. BUT top3_contribution=90.2% is a concentration warning. Monitor drop3 at n=60 milestone — kill if it goes negative.
n=42, drop3=+0.692, monthly=+9.93 SOL/mo. Three gates clear, n<100. drop3 is healthier than v10 (top3_contribution=81.5%). Next milestone: n=60.

n=23, drop3=+2.017, monthly=+10.24 SOL/mo. Best outlier-adjusted quality in portfolio (top3_contribution only 44.6%, trimmed_mean=+32.5%). Too early to promote but highest priority for data accumulation.
n=35, drop3=+0.337, monthly=+8.99 SOL/mo. Three gates clear. Next milestone: n=60.
n=75 (shadow), drop3=−1.769 but STRENGTHENING in edge-decay (last_25 median=+11.21%). Contradictory signal — recent improvement vs bad lifetime SOL. Continue to n=100 for formal verdict.
n=40, total=−1.661, drop3=−2.040. Deeply negative already. Kill at n=50 if drop3 still negative.

action_items.summary: n=60 milestone check for v10-best-double (currently n=51, ~9 trades away) and v9shadow-vel20-top5 (currently n=42, ~18 trades away). At n=60: re-run drop_top3 from leave-one-out-pnl.json. If v10 drop3 flips negative, kill immediately. If both hold positive, continue to n=100.

v9shadow-velmono-dev (n=23, drop3=+2.017, monthly=+10.24, top3_contribution=44.6%) has the best distribution quality in the portfolio. Priority: confirm at n=40 that the clean distribution persists (top3_contribution stays below 70%, drop3 stays positive). This is the most important data point to collect in the next 2 weeks.

v14-vel5-10-dd-shadow at n=40 has total=−1.661 SOL and drop_top3=−2.040. Edge-decay flag STABLE (not DECAYING) so early kill not triggered. Kill at n=50 if drop_top3 still negative — this is near-certain at current trajectory.

commands.note: KILLED 2026-05-12. n=108, total=−1.418 SOL, drop_top3=−1.907 SOL. Crossed n=100 with all outlier-strip gates negative. BE@+5% improved mean by ~3pp vs v16-calm-base but could not overcome the structural loss tail of the calm-survivor filter. The filter selects a broad distribution including simultaneous SL-sweep tokens (grad 20564 −91%, grad 20849 −34%+). Calm-survivor entry + TP=10/SL=25 does not accumulate SOL.

KILLED 2026-05-12. n=108, total=−0.862 SOL, drop_top3=−1.406 SOL. BE@+7% was the best variant by mean (−1.6% vs be5 −2.63%) and appeared closest to breakeven, but drop_top3 confirms the apparent edge requires the top 3 lottery wins. Without them, −1.406 SOL. INVALID.

KILLED 2026-05-12. n=107, total=−1.148 SOL, drop_top3=−1.692 SOL. Best per-trade median of the v17 cohort (8.53%, STABLE edge-decay, last-25 median=8.68%) but net SOL after outlier strip is −1.692. The v17 BE-recalibration experiment is complete: trigger level (5/7/9%) affects noise-band interference but not the fundamental SOL deficit. The calm-survivor filter family cannot pass the promotion bar.

KILLED 2026-05-12. n=106, total=−1.510 SOL, drop_top3=−2.054 SOL. Markov early-exit (P<0.30) confirmed: adds zero net-SOL value over static SL=25. The hold-side (v18-strict, already killed 2026-05-11) was confirmed inert, and the exit-side is now confirmed insufficient to overcome the calm-survivor structural loss tail. The Markov DPM experiment for this filter is complete.

commands.action_item_note: Diagnose HEALTHY at 2026-05-12 11:13 UTC. last_graduation_sec_ago=401, last_t30_callback=371, last_paper_trade=371. WS auto-reconnect confirmed healed — no manual restart needed.

All four v17/v18 calm-survivor variants crossed n=100 with drop_top3 negative: be5 n=108 drop3=−1.907, be7 n=108 drop3=−1.406, be9 n=107 drop3=−1.692, mkv-exitonly n=106 drop3=−2.054. Kill commands pushed this cycle. INVALID verdict confirmed.
T30 callback confirmed healthy: last_t30_callback_sec_ago=371 at diagnose run 2026-05-12T11:13 UTC. Pipeline auto-recovered — the stall was transient.

CLAUDE.md is intentionally numbers-free by design ('All numbers live in the bot-status JSON files, not here'). The leaderboard values this item proposed adding would contradict the CLAUDE.md process philosophy. Deferring — the data lives in bot-status JSON files where it belongs.

Keeping v10 as wide-gate control (−99..1000 gate, sl=25) to A/B against v20-base (corrected gate +5..+100, sl=30). Resolution deferred until v20-base reaches n=50 for a direct comparison. Both strategies still running.
